content.en:
"The method of creating the golden body on the other side is extremely difficult, even if it is the fingers of the golden body on the other side, it is difficult to create, and it is very dangerous, and if you are not careful, the body will still be seriously damaged!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Because of this, the Lord of Eternal Zero does not recommend that the Bone Transformation Realm try.

But Ye Tian is not afraid, he is not afraid of physical damage, it is a big deal to give up this replica body.

So, he was ready to give it a try.

......

Wanlong territorial waters.

Ye Tian's copy body is here to try to create the method of the golden body on the other side, and he is currently studying it from one finger.

He didn't have much of the golden inscriptions on the other side, and it was naturally very difficult to get one finger to study the method of the golden body on the other side, so he could only slowly study and create at the beginning, and experiment with his own flesh fingers.

He was not afraid of failure, so he did not need to be so cautious, and directly started his research very recklessly.

Such reckless behavior naturally fails.

No, soon he failed.

Click!!!

A finger shattered, and an invisible force even spread to his whole body, causing this body to crack, although it was repaired, but some traces could not be repaired in time, I am afraid that it will take endless years or incomparably precious treasures to recover from this injury.

"Study the method of the golden body on the other side, the price of failure is really terrifying, this is still studied with one finger, if you study the whole body, the whole body is afraid that it will be shattered in an instant, and you will not survive at all. "

Subsequently.

He used the Body of the Mist on the Other Shore to see if he could undo the damage.

Then, he began a second study.

Click!!

The second study failed.

But at this time, the body of mist on the other side successfully offset the damage.

"The misty body on the other side is really useful. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, he soon discovered that even if the Mist Body on the Other Shore negated the damage, if he used the Mist Body on the Other Shore every time, he would not be aware of the consequences of each failure, and he would not be able to sum up the experience.

In this way, even if he failed countless times, he would not be able to understand the mystery of the golden body method on the other side.

So.

He still chose not to use the misty body on the other side, and used the old-fashioned way to study the duplicate bodies one by one, sacrificing these duplicate bodies, so as to improve the method of the golden body on the other side little by little.

Time flies.

Several primeval epochs have passed.

Often after such a long period of research, Ye Tian naturally made great progress.

this day.

He finally succeeded in using hundreds of golden inscriptions on the other side to create a method of the golden body of the other side that only aimed at one finger, which was a secret method created by sacrificing countless copies of the body.

Of course, he also spent a lot of resources, after all, to study the method of the golden body on the other side, he had to use a lot of materials to cooperate with the research, and it was impossible not to pay nothing.

In this way, the method of the golden body on the other side that he created required the use of thirty-nine materials, each of which was very valuable, including the True Yang Ancient Stone, which was the treasure that he had deceived the Lord of Yanze in the first place.

After creating this method of the golden body on the other side that only aimed at the fingers, he spent another period of time perfecting it to make sure that there were no problems, and then he began to officially cultivate.

Rumble!!!!!

One material resource after another was refined by Ye Tian, and when combined with the golden text on the other side, it was integrated into the index finger.

Seventy-two golden inscriptions on the other side are combined with each other, turning into an incomparably mysterious pattern on the other side, which is perfectly integrated with the index finger.

Ultimately.

This finger began to undergo a metamorphosis, constantly absorbing energy, becoming more and more powerful.

"This finger has become the golden body of the other side!"

He tried to use this finger to cast a top-notch primeval technique-the primeval god and demon finger, this top-notch primeval technique, he rarely used, so in battle, it was inferior to the primeval god and demon spear.

But now, this finger of his has become the golden body of the other side, which can just cooperate with the ancient god and demon finger to attack.

Rumble!!!!

With a finger, it directly smashed the barrier of the boundary gap of the territorial sea and penetrated to the land of eternity.

The power of this finger shocked Ye Tiandu.

"What a terrifying power, this finger should have reached the attack power of the Eight Bone Transformation Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He is now a fifth-time Bone Transformation Realm primordial-level genius, and his true combat power is between the seventh-time Bone Transformation Realm and the eighth Bone Transformation Realm, and his most powerful attack power before is not at the level of the Eighth Bone Transformation Realm.

But now, the attack power of this finger has reached the eight bone transformation realm, and it can at least threaten the eight bone transformation realm.

Of course.

He only reached the eighth bone transformation realm with the power of this finger, and he still did not reach the eighth bone transformation realm in other aspects.

"If I cooperate with a technique on the other side of the gate, I may be able to truly injure or even defeat the weakest Eight Bone Transformation Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, the number of golden texts on the other side that he has now is still very rare, and it is difficult to create more golden body methods on the other side, let alone create the magic skills of the other side.

According to the Lord of Eternal Zero, the power of the Divine Power Technique on the other side far surpasses that of the top primeval arts, and once it is created, it is a genius of the other side, surpassing the primeval level genius.

"Right now, I still need to get some gold from the other side!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

First of all, he had to understand the golden texts on the other side of Guheng Mountain.

However, Gu Hengshan took out the other side of the gold text, it is definitely not all, there must be a lot of other side gold text hidden, without a certain status, it is impossible to contact the rest of the other side gold text.

......

Guheng Mountain.

Ye Tian went to see the lord of Xunshan.

He was not qualified to meet the Deputy Mountain Lord now, so he could only meet this Lord of Xunshan.

His purpose this time was very simple, that is, to report to the land of the Haven inheritance on the other side.

Even if the Lord of Xunshan takes most of the credit, he will give him a small half of the credit.

This way, he can also earn a lot of contribution points, and he can also get his own position promoted.

Not to mention much, there is still a lot of hope for becoming a sixth-level venerable envoy.

But if you want to become a lord, that's impossible.

"Lord of Endless, what are you looking for me?"

The Lord of Xunshan asked.

Ye Tian said: "Lord of Xunshan Mountain, Gu Heng Mountain should give a lot of contribution points to the discovery of the Chance Treasure Land, right?"

"Yes!"

The Lord of Xunshan nodded.

"I've found a place where the Haven heritage is on the other side. "

Ye Tian revealed.

"Are you sure that the land of the Haven inheritance on the other side?" said the Lord of Xunshan in surprise.

"Sure!"

Ye Tian replied affirmatively.

"Take me to see it!"

The main road of Mount Xun.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian immediately took the Lord of Xunshan Mountain to the black giant mountain above the black sea area.
